title: DN40 2QR, CPL Products Limited: environmental permit - EPR/DP3134LK/V009
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision for:   Operator name: CPL Products Limited Installation name: Immingham Briquetting Works Permit number: EPR/DP3134LK/V009  "
